Campaigns

Labour have broken their promise to British farmers with the Family Farm Tax. Labour's Family Farm Tax will stop farms being passed to the next generation...

Save our local pubs

Petition: Common sense immigration rules

Labour are making things even harder for businesses like yours. Their Employment Right Bill would mean: £5 billion in extra costs for businesses. Fewer jobs and...

Petition: Save your Post Office

Labour are threatening to close post offices across the country. Making it harder for people who are offline to access vital services. Reducing footfall to our...

Say No to Starmer's ID

Labour's “Digital ID” gimmick won't stop the boats. It's a desperate distraction from their scandals. We won't back any system that makes ID mandatory for...

Scrap Stamp Duty on main homes

Sign our petition urging Labour to scrap Stamp Duty on main homes.

Cut my bills

Calling on the Government to scrap tax increases for farmers
